evidence: Mean description length rises from 3306 in arshkon to 4936 in scraped LinkedIn; p95 jumps from 7210 to 8753.
Explicit entry share is only 0.022 in 2026-04, while YOE<=2 is 0.115.
Arshkon native entry rows average 4.18 YOE and only 28.6% are <=2 YOE.
Metro missingness is 24.5%-40.8% and distinct metros collapse to 27 in scraped 2026 versus 74-87 in 2024 sources.
Scraped 2026 contains ~1000 distinct industry strings versus 163 in arshkon, suggesting label semantics are not stable across sources.
Company size is 99% present in arshkon but absent in asaniczka and scraped, so it is a single-source diagnostic rather than a cross-period control.
Unknown seniority rises to 54%-55% in scraped 2026 and dominates the 3-level collapse, so `seniority_3level` is too coarse for junior analysis.
Only 16.1% of scraped SWE rows carry LLM-cleaned text, so text-heavy 2026 estimates are coverage-limited.
